codeReview.summary: The fix commit fully addresses the prior copy-truthfulness failures: the older-history load-more catch path now logs raw errors only to diagnostics while always showing the intentional Leagueback fallback string, and the match-details header no longer renders cache/storage source badges. The scoped dashboard edit preserves the existing details status copy and does not introduce new user-facing wording regressions in the reviewed paths.

summary: Pass: the fix removes the implementation-facing match-details source badge and ensures the older-history failure path no longer exposes raw Error.message text to end users.
